name: Cyborg Context
description: Inject Bob's Cyborg context (projects, tasks, events) into conversations as a native context engine
author: Mike

cacheTtlSeconds.description: How long to cache Cyborg context before refetching (default: 5 minutes)

maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens to allocate for Cyborg context (default: 2000)

enabled.label: Enable Cyborg Context Injection
enabled.help: When enabled, Bob's active projects, tasks, and events are automatically injected into conversation context

cyborgUrl.label: Cyborg Service URL
cyborgUrl.help: URL of the Cyborg service (default: http://127.0.0.1:8420)

includeProjects.label: Include Projects
includeProjects.help: Include active projects in injected context

includeTasks.label: Include Tasks
includeTasks.help: Include active tasks in injected context

includeEvents.label: Include Events
includeEvents.help: Include upcoming events in injected context

cacheTtlSeconds.label: Cache TTL
cacheTtlSeconds.help: Time in seconds to cache Cyborg context before refetching (default: 300)

maxTokens.label: Max Tokens
maxTokens.help: Maximum tokens to allocate for Cyborg context (default: 2000)
